subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest what hath befallen Thy chosen ones in Thy path, and Thou knowest what they have borne in their love for Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تری ما ورد علی اصفیائک فی سبیلک و تعلم ما حملوا فی حبک و
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
